---
name: Annotation came out wrong
about: charter annotate extracted bad, missing, or wrong decisions from your doc
title: "[annotate] "
labels: annotation-quality
---

**The source doc** (a few sentences, or a link — redact anything private)

**What CHARTER.md came out as** (paste the generated lines)

```
[D-001] ...
```

**What you expected instead** (which decisions were missed, wrong, or should
have had a different enforcer)

**Backend used:** CHARTER_LLM_CMD (`claude -p` / other) or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

**Version:** `charter --version` or commit hash
